programmes.show_description: This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Teamwork. During a football game with her friends, Tish notices that Cori is ignoring Jeffy, causing her to feel left out and alone.
Hiding. Children's animation. Bing and Flop play hide-and-seek on the way to Padget's shop. Bing does not want the game to end, and he hides in the stock room, where he gets stuck.
Yellow. Preschool series. It's a special day for yellow Laa-Laa. Big yellow flowers grow in Teletubbyland and a yellow balloon leads Laa-Laa to Tiddlytubby Umby Pumby.
Helpful Tee. Tee wants to help Mo out with chores around the house. However, the more Tee tries to help, the more chores he creates.
Carrot the Champion. Evil Pea captures Supertato, but Carrot finally masters the ultimate flip kick and rescues her.
Names. Pando has an earworm, and Bing isn't impressed.
Rock-a-Bye Bo. Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Stick Time. How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!
The Mixtape Badge. The Squirrels make a mixtape for Duggee to remind him of their happy memories together.
Fairy Tale. Dad tells the kids a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s!
Bin Night. Bingo tells Dad about a new kid at kindy who is mean to her. Mum offers some good advice.
Go Jet Academy: Sea Arch Escape. The Go Jetters race to save Tala and Xuli, who are trapped beneath a collapsing sea arch.
The Tale of the Cotton-Tail's Treetop Tumble. Animated series. After Old Brown snatches her, Cotton-tail gets stuck up a tree. It's up to Peter, Lily and Benjamin to rescue her.
Elephant Swim Lesson. A baby elephant separated from its herd needs the Octonauts' help swimming to safety.
Octonaughty and the Fractionator. Octonaughty uses his new invention, the Fractionator, to break into The Museum of Numbers to steal the Golden Infinity. But has he met his match?
Jaybird. The adventures of 26 lively letters who can make words come to life by holding hands. J wants to sing and fly like a bird - can A and friends help?
Yay for Rain Day. Good weather ruins Love Monster's indoor day, as his friends want to play outside instead.
Mud. Bella and Lift visit the Cloud Kitchen, where Patch is busy with the Playtimers making a tasty treat called Munchy Muddy Meadows.
Okra. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the spectacular music duo Okra playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.
Nicky. Bing shows Sula's cousin how to voosh a toy car down a slide - but then things go wrong.
Juice. Dee encourages a friend to say 'juice', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of juice - orange juice, sweet juice and Dee even gets to squeeze juice!
Xylophone Blues. Lu feels discouraged when her xylophone playing doesn't get the reaction she'd hoped for.
Sitting Pretty. The Piggies build a relaxing bench for Brian, but Wilf makes it wild!
More About Spinning. Stop-motion preschool programme. The Twirlywoos see a school teacher pick up different coloured hoops and set them spinning, so they try to spin hoops too.
Beach, Boats and Birds. Justin and his friend take a boat trip to spot some wildlife. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble creates a beach in his garden, but things don't entirely go to plan.
Purple. Preschool series. In Tummy Tales, a boy learns to knit with purple wool and in Teletubbyland, purple Tinky Winky answers the Tubby Phone and leads the Tubby Phone Dance.
Socks. Nigel and Baby Bear invite babies and their grown-ups to explore socks through discovery, play, song and story. Babies and grown-ups at home can join in, too!
Lake. Elsee plays I-spy next to a beautiful lake with her new friend Olivia.
Feeding the Garden. Aaron is joined by Jackson and Mia as they discover how to feed the garden, and the special role wiggly worms have in making sure the plants stay happy and healthy.
Aeroplane Pilot. Dylan the aeroplane pilot wants to give his passengers an amazing flight, but he doesn't know where to land!
Marching Band. Animated series about a group of singing potatoes. There is nothing like a marching band - the Small Potatoes lead a parade of musical instruments in a rousing anthem.
Day at the Beach. On a hot summer's day, Ginger and the Peas try to find the perfect spot on the beach.
The Magic Xylophone. Bluey and Bingo squabble over their magic xylophone, which has the power to freeze Dad.
The Biology Badge. Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturise themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid. Can they find out what's making her cough?
Chasing Clouds. The Game Catchers reach the Jelly Planet and play pillow riding.
Timmy in Tune. Timmy is fascinated with the xylophone, but he drops it and loses one of the chimes.
Kyra and Khloe Visit Nana. Kyra and Khloe make yummy cakes for their Nana. But will Nana like her tasty treats?
Aleisha's Ugandan Rolex. Aleisha is making rolex, a Ugandan omelette-style recipe with fresh vegetables.

programmes.show_name: Teeny Tiny Creatures with Chantelle and Rory
programmes.show_description: Newts. Chantelle meets two salamanders while Rory and Sandy are out and about looking for newts.
Mission: Last Minute Visitor. Disability assistance dog Tinks and her owner Charli have a long list of chores to do, all in time for Annabel, their last minute visitor!
Senegal Bushbaby and Dwarf Crocodile. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a Senegal bushbaby and dwarf crocodiles.
Waffle the Cat Sitter. Mrs Hobbs interviews for a cat sitter for George, and Waffle wants the job.
A Noisy Neighbour. Oona tries to find a place for a noisy, little starling to sleep.
Frida Mouse. Yukee discovers a little mouse who is lost in the woods. Might a musical song map help Frida find her way back home and never get lost again?   Followed by My Petsaurus.
The Singing Badge. Animated preschool series. Duggee and the Squirrels go for a walk in the countryside. It's tiring, but if they sing a song, they'll be back before they know it.
House. Preschool series about words. Dee encourages a friend to say 'house', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure, looking at lots of different kinds of houses.
Sail the Seven Seas. Ahoy there! Join the Seven Times Table as he sails the seven seas in search of the rainbow's end. He collects his crew as he sings his Seven Times sea shanty.
Fair. Educational fun. It's O's birthday, but R has forgotten to get him a present! Can she magic up a big wheel, a helter-skelter and a hall of mirrors from thin air?
Getting Sporty. Educational series using Makaton sign language. Today, Justin and his friends learn how to boogie board while Mr Tumble plays a game of tennis with Lord Tumble.
Breakfast. Preschool series. The Teletubbies wake up and can't decide whether to have tubby custard or tubby toast, so they have both!
Patchwork Fly. The Patchwork Pals have a problem: today is their lazy day, but Patchwork Fly won't let them rest! What is he up to?
Raa Raa and the Jungle Gym. Animation set in the Jingly Jangly Jungle. An overenthusiastic Raa Raa breaks Pia's new jungle gym, but he manages to fix it so everyone can have a turn.
Monkey-Sitting. Wilson has his hands full when an adorable monkey he is babysitting goes bananas.
Episode 12. Comedy sketch show for younger viewers. Captain Adorable tries to demonstrate his super mind power to Awesome Girl.
Fun Machines. Series for young children that celebrates lots of different amazing machines. In this episode, Grace shows off three amazing machines that are all built for having fun!
Make Up Your Mind, Nina! The Game Catchers land on a new planet and learn to play spider's web. Before they can begin, they must help an indecisive Catercoon confidently shed its cocoon.
Barracudas. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. Shellington and the Vegimals are on a mission to replant a mangrove forest.
The Tale of the Broken Bed. Animated series. When Peter breaks the bed his father made for him, he finds that fixing it leads to an unexpected adventure.
The Playing Badge. Animated preschool series. Naughty Monkey is visited by his cousins, and it turns out they are even naughtier than Naughty Monkey!
Juno's Bubble Bath Breakout. Juno gets sticky from tree sap, so Vida needs to give her a bubble bath - but she's nervous!
Dangle Disaster. Evil Pea has set a trap for the Tatocar but gets herself and Corn trapped instead.
Mission Bling-Bling. Weasy falls in love with a gold watch, but it belongs to the farmer...
Cable Car Crisis. Preston needs rescuing from a stuck cable car. But when the car suddenly starts moving again, Mojo has to ride the cable to chase it down and save poor Preston.
Fairy Tale. Dad tells the kids a real-life fairy tale about growing up in a wild place called the 80s!
Handstand. At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills.
Tall Tales. Brinicle gets a job as a news reporter but starts inventing stories to boost his ratings - until he realises his tall tales are misleading the other penguins.
Andy and the Marine Iguanas. Andy heads to the Galapagos Islands to find out how marine iguanas keep clean.
PE Waffle. Evie forgets her reading book, so Waffle takes it to her at school. As Waffle reaches the playground, he sees Evie's PE class and is desperate to join in.
The Fixie Pixie Wish. Rafi's Fixie Pixie wish causes chaos. She realises it's better to tell the truth than hide mistakes, and fixes a plate with Ruby and Jake.
It's Time to Mix Colours. JoJo is painting a picture but runs out of green paint. It's time for a Gran Gran plan!
Auto Cat. Animation for preschool children. Duck has some competition for Sarah's attention when a brand new toy arrives.
The Little Bag. Stop-motion animation. Small gives Tiny a bag to keep her panpipes in, but when Tiny goes to take her pipes out of the bag, something strange has happened to them.
MeMo Dog. BaBa becomes friends with a Tweetie. MeMo would like a Tweetie friend too. At Play Time, MeMo befriends a new toy called MeMo Dog. Yummy Dog also wants to be MeMo Dog's friend.
Pinky Ponk Adventure. Series for young children set in a magical forest. The Pinky Ponk gets stuck in a tree and tips up. Everybody slides up and down and the Pinky Ponk breaks free.
Tom Hardy - Tisha and the Blossom. Tom Hardy reminds us of the importance of being mindful with the story of Tisha and the Blossom.
This Is CBeebies. Programmes start at 6.00am.
Baby Jake Loves Playing Ball. The adventures of magical Baby Jake and friends. Baby Jake and Pengy Quin go on a snowy adventure and play ball.
Panama Canal, Panama. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! Glitch's attempt to jump the queue at the Panama Canal leaves him with a sinking feeling.
Toy Party. Children's animation. Bing gets jealous when Sula pays more attention to Pando on a playdate. As he feels more and more left out, Bing tries to get Sula's attention.
What's Going on Day. Love Monster doesn't know what day they are celebrating in Fluffytown today.
Ludwig the Lady. Jackson's big, blue chicken-thing, Ludwig, is going to lay an egg. And it's up to Mojo and Bo to carry the big bird across dangerous roads to Preston's egg-hatching shed!
Glow Koko. When Mtambo takes Koko, Piper and Hodge on a night tour through Safari Park, Koko discovers a new world of Chuggington that glows in the dark.
Copy That. Dragonfruitflyus mimics Vegesaur sounds, which sparks a competition among Pea-Rex babies.
Mango. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical wish granter Mango, ready to make all the cast wishes come true!   Followed by My Petsaurus.
Peas and Quiet. Supertato and Carrot investigate strange noises in the middle of the night.
Wellies. Children's animation. Bing discovers a hole in his favourite yellow wellies, but he does not want to throw them away. With Flop's help, Bing finds a way to recycle them.
Fire Engine. Bing doesn't get to sit in the fire engine but later gets to help out when Arlo is stuck.
Spot the Difference. Duggee looks different, but what is it? By playing some looking games, the Squirrels learn how best to spot the difference.
Happy's First Day. On Happy's first day, we learn where he found his love of water.
Bioluminescent Bay, Puerto Rico. Animated adventure comedy series. Glitch's bath time puts the creatures of Puerto Rico's Bioluminescent Bay in bubble-trouble.
The Tale of the One That Got Away. Animated series. When Peter and friends encounter the legendary trout Jack Sharp, they try to reel the fish in once and for all.
The Pirate Parrotfish. Animated deep sea adventures. The Octonauts go on a pirate treasure hunt, and Kwazii meets the perfect sidekick - a parrotfish!
Pigs Might Fly. Apple-picking with Preston's drone goes terribly wrong, and Mojo and Bo are on the chase!
New Kit. It's Sophie's first day. She worries that she's no good at football but feels like part of the team when she helps the others work together to create a fantastic new football kit.
Party. Mr Tumble is getting ready for a special birthday party - but whose birthday is it?
Hospital. Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious X-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy, leaving Bluey no choice but to operate immediately!
Whale Watching. The kids want Mum and Dad to play whale watching, but they are tired after a late night.
The Puddle Badge. Happy sees a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in.
The Election Badge. When Eugene unexpectedly drops out of running the summer fair, Duggee and the Squirrels hold an election to choose the best candidate for the job.
The Fishy Treasure Hunt. The Piris join a treasure hunt competition, but is Captain Krill all that he appears?
Prank Day! Dad and Cosima both think they're the best at pranking. Their prank war quickly spirals out of control, until Big Lizard finally reveals Proxima's real pranking champion!
Apple Tales. When Ginger gets stung by an Appleflyus, it leaves a painful and incredibly itchy sore.
Wolong Panda Reserve, China. Meet the Go Jetters, four explorers on a global adventure! The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who is taking all the pandas' bamboo?
Mission Obstacle Course. When Weasy keeps losing the obstacle race, he decides to cheat in an unusual way.
Odd Bot Team Up/The Lost King. Doc Ock and Spidey get trapped. Spidey searches for a lost chess piece.
Pininga Turtle. While testing out the new Terra-Gup 6, Tweak crash lands in the desert.
Bug Hotel. Stan builds a feeder for Fifi's bug friend. The food is so good, it attracts many guests!
Pirate Ship Pursuit. Supertato and Captain Pak Choi team up to get her pirate ship back from Evil Pea.

programmes.show_name: New: Talking Tom Heroes: Suddenly Super
programmes.show_description: Super Smart. Ben gets an invitation to a super brainy event - but it's a trap set by Professor Kranium.
Argentinosaurus and Eggshell. Preschool adventure series. Andy travels back 95 million years in search of an eggshell belonging to one of the biggest animals to ever walk the earth.
Princess Pea. Jen and Small want to cook pillow samosas for Princess Sprout, but have run out of peas.
Hedges. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers go on an eco quest to find out all about hedges.
Porcupine and Three-Banded Armadillo. Aneeshwar and Lizzie meet a porcupine and a three-banded armadillo.
Waffle's Hoopla. Waffle's first day at after-school club includes a hoop hunt and hoopla stage performance.
The Maze Badge. Animated preschool series. The Squirrels work hard to help Duggee clean his workshop but when they finish they can't find him. Oh! They've built a maze around him!
Long-Armed Squid. Animated deep sea adventures with Captain Barnacles and his explorers. Peso and Kwazii venture down to the midnight zone to help a hurt creature.
Tidbit's Achy Ankles. Tidbit sprains his ankles before performing, so Fergie teaches him wheelchair dance moves.
The Taj Mahal, India. Animated adventure comedy series. The grimbots attach a bit of the Taj Mahal to Grim HQ. Can the Go Jetters fix the glitch?
The Baby Wish. Rafi's wish turns her dads into babies. She realises being a grown-up means having responsibility - and that chores can be fun when mixed with dancing.
Play with Your Food. Toad needs a new pumpkin double bass. Yukee and Twinkle use vegetables from the veggie patch to create some surprising instruments - but none are quite right for Toad.
Kiwi. Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Kiwi performing Do the Kiwi Dance - if he manages to find someone to interview him first.
Treasure Hunt. Justin and his friends go on a treasure hunt, and Mr Tumble's cake goes on an adventure!
On the Road. Toddlers and their grown-ups explore an 'on the road' theme, sing songs and enjoy a story.
Who Is Sleepy Now? Kiri and Lou can't sleep. Pania says she will sing them a song, but only if they stay awake for the whole thing.
Fine Forest Gift Tree. Wilf asks the Piggies to build a vehicle with a big basket - he wants to use it to steal all the gifts at the Fine Forest party! The Piggies must get them back.
Juno's No Nap Day. Juno decides to give up napping but soon has a cranky meltdown, as she is so tired.
Mo's New Bed. Preschool animation about a baby monkey and his mother. Mo is excited about her new bed and can't wait to try it out. However, she's not the only one.
The Frozen Planet. The Game Catchers land on the Frozen Planet and play a game of snowball fight!
The Big Itch. Split has an itch but no scratching stick. Ginger and the Pea-Rexes get creative to help.
Weather Presenter. Dylan the weather reporter wants to describe all types of weather. However, the sun refuses to come out, so he has to get creative.
Rock-a-Bye Bo. Bo is tired and falls asleep in the middle of hunting for Fabio's lost inflatable fruit. It's up to Mojo to finish the job - without waking up poor, exhausted Bo!
Pizza Pie in the Sky. The heroes must save a giant pizza from the Rakoonz, while Tom stays silent to win a bet.
Water Habitat. Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover why water habitats are important places. They make their own mini habitat using old containers, rainwater, rocks and sticks.
Slimy Sammy. Flutter buys a new fishy pet from slippery salesman Mervyn, but the Piripenguins get stuck in its gloopy slime. Can the friends find a solution to their sticky situation?
Go Jet Academy: Lightning Bolt Blackout. An electrical storm strikes Academy Island, and the Go Jetters are trapped!
We All Stand Together. Click Clack and friends work together as they conquer a precarious mountain.
How We Met Dunk. Cosima and Big Lizard find Dunk stranded on a beach and rush to help.
The Gingerbread Wish. Rafi's gingerbread wish brings her bakes to life. She discovers perfect can mean different things, and messy can be special too.
Road Trip. Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip.
Nikhil and Jay and the King of Cricket. When Amma tells them that Thatha is the king of cricket, Nikhil and Jay try their hardest to play so they can be the kings of cricket too!
It's Time to Go to the Airport. JoJo, Gran Gran, Mummy and Daddy are at the airport waiting to take a flight to see a special someone - Great-Gran Gran.
Coloured Light. Animation. Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures. Rainbow's colourful glow inspires an art project.
I Do Not Ever, Never Want My Wobbly Tooth to Fall Out. Children's animation with siblings Charlie and Lola. Lola has her first wobbly tooth. She does not want a big gap in her teeth.
The Little Tiny Tea. Mr Onion finds two paper crowns left in the Toy House. Pepi Nana and Little Nana try the crowns and play at being princesses.
Being MeMo. BaBa is playing a copying game, but MeMo wants to play something else. With the help of the Yummies, they find a happy way to compromise.
Tombliboos' Tower of Five. In a magical forest, characters have adventures. The Pontipines count to five. Makka Pakka builds a pile of five stones. The Tombliboos are in their bush.
David Schwimmer - If I Had a Sleepy Sloth. Actor David Schwimmer reads a Bedtime Story about a sleepy sloth.
